message:
feat: add draw_describe tool + code review fixes

- Add draw_describe MCP tool: converts .excalidraw to TypeScript via toCode()
- Sidecar .drawmode.ts now uses toCode() for clean standalone output
- Fix timer leak in executor Promise.race
- Fix filePath overwrite in multi-format rendering
- Fix updateNode not propagating row/col to grid layout
- Fix updateEdge leaking label/style into edge.opts
- Fix WASM buffer overflow: add margin checks, scale buffer by input size
- Fix Zig absInt overflow on minInt(i32), writeFloat frac clamping
- Fix JSON escaping for newlines/tabs in Zig util
- Hoist TextEncoder/TextDecoder to module singletons
- Fix fromMermaid O(E*N) reverse-map with pre-built idToName
- Log WASM errors to stderr instead of silent swallow
- Remove dead sourceCode from RenderOpts
- Update docs: all 3 tools, missing type properties, diamond gotcha
